telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Apr 29, 2026 Markets displayed late-cycle characteristics as Fed policy uncertainty triggered defensive positioning, with Bitcoin emerging as an unconventional safe haven amid geopolitical stress. The divergence between risk assets and traditional hedges like gold signals growing institutional concern over macro stability and potential regime shifts ahead.
